sections.title: Performance Results
sections.content: The following table summarizes the benchmark results across all models tested. Each model was evaluated on three datasets with five-fold cross validation to ensure statistical reliability.

lines.text: The following table summarizes the benchmark results

sections.title: [Table on page 1]
sections.content:
Model | Accuracy | F1 Score | Latency
---+---+---+---
BERT-base | 94.2% | 93.1% | 45ms
RoBERTa-large | 95.8% | 95.0% | 78ms
DeBERTa-v3 | 96.1% | 95.5% | 92ms
DistilBERT | 91.3% | 90.2% | 22ms

sections.title: Performance Results
sections.content: As shown in the table above, DeBERTa-v3 achieves the highest accuracy and F1 score, though with increased latency. DistilBERT offers the best speed-accuracy tradeoff for latency-sensitive deployments.
